subject: Login after boot very slow with spinning cursor
description: After entering password, desktop takes 5+ minutes; eventually loads with all startup apps.

ts_steps.title: Startup sort
ts_steps.action: Task Manager → Startup — sort by impact.

ts_steps.title: Disable batch 1
ts_steps.action: Disable half of high-impact non-Microsoft items; reboot; test.

ts_steps.title: Binary search
ts_steps.action: Narrow to single offending startup app.

ts_steps.title: Profile type
ts_steps.action: Check roaming/FSLogix — profile size on server.

ts_steps.title: Test local user
ts_steps.action: New local user login speed compare.

ts_steps.title: User profiles list
ts_steps.action: sysdm.cpl → Advanced → User Profiles — type and size.

ts_steps.title: System log
ts_steps.action: Disk and Service Control Manager errors at logon time.

ts_steps.title: gpresult
ts_steps.action: gpresult /h report.html — scripts, drive maps, printers.

ts_steps.title: Network path
ts_steps.action: Verify DC/DFS reachable at logon (Ethernet vs Wi-Fi).

ts_steps.title: AV logon scan
ts_steps.action: Check if full scan at logon — vendor guidance.

internal_information: GPO scripts, bloated profile, FSLogix, AV, broken DFS at logon.
